title: doellingeria umbellata var. umbellata
intro: Doellingeria umbellata var. umbellata, commonly known as the flat-topped white aster, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its flat-topped clusters of small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The medicinal properties of Doellingeria umbellata var. umbellata have been attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, and its antiseptic properties have been found to promote wound healing and prevent infection. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
